calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Prove Up Hearing Brief
Off Calendar Mar-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Erik Gonzales.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768.

Plaintiff John Vannucci, Esq. was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Erik Gonzales.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on July 24, 2013.
Default was entered against defendant on August 21, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on August 21, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff John Vannucci, and against the Defaulted Defendant Erik Gonzales, as follows:

Damages - $25,000.00.
Costs - $550.00.
Total - $25,550.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
